steps.title: Spot the list structure
steps.content: The passage explicitly introduces three basic steps and marks the first with “First” and the third with “Third,” establishing a numbered sequence.

steps.title: Match the transition to the sequence
steps.content: “Second” completes the First → Second → Third progression established in the introduction. A) introduces examples, C) signals consequence, and D) signals contrast—none continue the numbered list. That matches choice B — B is correct.
